summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW Lluvia Live features: admin panel, ghost mode, reels, and photos. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality fully operational with proper admin access controls.
passed_tests: Backend: All 31 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: POST /api/reels creates reel successfully
Backend: GET /api/reels returns reels list
Backend: POST /api/reels/{id}/like toggles reel likes
Backend: POST /api/photos creates photo successfully
Backend: GET /api/photos returns photos list
Backend: POST /api/photos/{id}/like toggles photo likes
Backend: POST /api/admin/set-admin activates admin with correct key 'lluvia_admin_2024'
Backend: POST /api/admin/set-admin returns 403 with invalid key
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns user list for admin
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{id} allows admin to modify users
Backend: POST /api/users/{id}/ghost-mode works for admin users
Backend: POST /api/users/{id}/ghost-mode returns 403 for non-admin users
Frontend: Login and register functionality working
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all 4 tabs (Salas, Juegos, Rankings, Clanes)
Frontend: Quick action buttons work (My Room, Quick Join, Reels, Galería)
Frontend: Reels page - create reel, view reels, like reels all functional
Frontend: Photos/Galería page - create photo, view photos, like photos all functional
Frontend: Profile page shows user info correctly
Frontend: Ghost mode button present and correctly restricted to admin
Frontend: Admin panel button only visible for admin users
Frontend: Admin panel requires correct admin key activation
Frontend: Admin panel shows user statistics (16 Users, 2 Salas, Total Monedas)
Frontend: Admin panel displays user list with management actions
Frontend: Admin panel has Users and Rooms tabs
Frontend: Admin panel user modification buttons (+10K coins, +Level, Delete)
Frontend: Ghost mode activation works for admin users
Frontend: Admin user shows crown icon and ADMIN VIP status
